title: Flat Crops
description:
[1.8.9] Replaces most crops with flat, 1 pixel tall smooth colors.
Made to be easy on the eyes in Hypixel Skyblock farming.
body:
**Flat Crops** is a texture pack made for **1.8.9** - specifically aimed towards farmers in **Hypixel Skyblock**.

**Flat Crops** removes the ugly default crops that you'll be staring at for thousands of hours and replaces them with clean, flat, 1 pixel tall smooth tiles that are easier on the eyes. It also removes breaking particles.

![farming with the pack on](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/626f616ac229b1640cf44bf69c06e71b109ac7b2.png)

This pack affects the following crops:
- All 4 base crops [potato, wheat, wart, carrot]
- All mushrooms [red, brown]
- Cocoa

Due to sugarcane and cactus being crops that grow up in full block stages, they likely will not be added unless anyone has a good idea on how to implement them.</br>
Minecraft 1.8.9 texture packs do not have a way to prevent face culling, so I am unable to add melons and pumpkins without them having a strange x-ray effect when against other blocks.

_want to contact me? my discord and minecraft ign is **sageuk**_
